prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: hero animation source frame sheet for Orbwalker
Primary request: production candidate source frame sheet for hero animation normalization later with sprite-pipeline.
Subject: the same hooded orbwalker hero in eight consistent full-body source frames: idle 1, idle 2, orb-cast windup, orb-cast release, hurt, guard/block, victory, defeat/kneel. Same costume, proportions, and camera angle across all frames.
Style/medium: polished stylized 2D game character sprite/pose art, clean silhouette, animation-source friendly.
Composition/framing: 4x2 sheet, full-body frames centered in equal cells, simple neutral background, no labels.
Lighting/mood: readable gameplay animation source, not final runtime integration.
Color palette: dark cloak, leather, antique gold trim, cyan/orange elemental glow accents.
Constraints: no readable text, no labels, no logo, no watermark, no gore, no casino imagery, avoid cropped limbs; keep character identity consistent across frames.
